state.next-action:
Phase 30 complete: eval framework v2 — domains, tech stacks, rounds per project (5 tasks, 5 commits). All CLI and site features shipped, build passes.
=== DONE THIS SESSION === - gad rounds --project: per-project rounds derived from TRACE.json requirements_version - Build requirement gate in gad eval score (checks preserved build, shows pass/fail) - Human time estimation instruction in eval prompt (step 0) - Source + build size computation in gad eval preserve (writes to TRACE.json) - Domain + tech stack badges on ProjectHeroSection.tsx (site)
=== NEXT === 1. GAD CLI build/release pipeline (Windows) — phase 29 2. Run evals (round 5, tech-stacks, reverse-engineer) 3. Phase 27: structured objective data production 4. Phase 33: reverse-engineer eval methodology
